Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Relief From Waiver Of Discovery Objections And Privileges To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant THIA PARODI'S Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Discovery Objections And Privileges To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents is Granted, but subject to Order issued on October 7, 2013. This Order does not limit or supersede the Order issued on October 7, 2013. No Opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: David E. May; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Thia Parodi'S Further Responses To Discovery, Set One, And Req. For Attorney'S Fees And Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on WED-OCT-02-2013:
Nairi Paterson, Esq. of Stratman, Patterson & Hunter [510.457.3472] appearing for defendant THIA PARODI;
No other appearnces.

The Court initially adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff NICOLE MARTHE'S Motion To Compel Thia Parodi's Further Responses To Discovery, Set One, And Requests For Attorney's Fees And Sanctions GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

Subsequent to defense counsel's tardy arrival, the Court recalled the matter, heard argument, vacated its ruling, and took plaintiff's motion under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
